title: GPT 5.6 explained in 8min..
summary: OpenAI announced GPT 5.6, which faces regulatory scrutiny as the AI industry matures. OpenAI is consolidating its model lineup to three offerings: Sol, Terra, and Luna. The video compares this development to Anthropic's Mythos 5 and Fable 5 models, which were paused pending further review.
writeup: Caleb Writes Code breaks down OpenAI's announcement of GPT 5.6, framing it against a backdrop of government regulation as the AI industry matures. The video compares GPT 5.6 to Anthropic's Mythos 5 and Fable 5 models, both paused pending regulatory review. The central takeaway: OpenAI is consolidating its lineup into three offerings named Sol, Terra, and Luna, with model synthesis and regulatory pressure as the recurring themes.
